description: Crafted from soft cotton/lycra fabric, this high coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with a three section style with elegant lace detailing that ensures lift and support through the day with a cut that offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for all day support.Made of breathable stretch cotton/lycra fabric for enhanced comfortThree section style with elegant floral lace detailing for perfect shaping and styleBeautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretchPrinted label for abrasion-free comfortWash careHand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or ironDrip dry in shade Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
